sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) reported strong first-quarter results, surpassing Wall Street expectations for profitability and revenue. The real estate investment trust posted funds from operations (FFO) of $2.04 per share, exceeding analyst estimates of $2.01 per share. The company also reported net income of $241 million and revenue of $856 million, beating forecasts.

feed.title: Philip Morris (PM) issues $1.5B of 2029 and 2036 senior notes (4.125%/4.875%)
feed.summary: Philip Morris International has completed a $1.5 billion senior unsecured note offering, consisting of two tranches: $750 million of 4.125% Notes due April 27, 2029, and $750 million of 4.875% Notes due April 29, 2036. The net proceeds, approximately $1.48 billion, will be added to general funds for corporate purposes, including repaying commercial paper and refinancing existing notes. These notes are unsecured obligations, not listed on any exchange, and bear interest semiannually from April 29, 2026.

feed.title: F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
feed.summary: F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) reported strong Q1 CY2026 results, exceeding Wall Street's expectations with revenue up 11% year-on-year to $811.7 million and an adjusted EPS beat of 12.9%. The company also provided better-than-expected revenue guidance for Q2 CY2026 and raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance. F5's Chairman, President, and CEO highlighted 22% product revenue growth, marking seven consecutive quarters of double-digit product growth.

feed.title: F5 Adds Anand Eswaran to Board, Strengthening AI Focus
feed.summary: F5, Inc. (FFIV) has appointed Anand Eswaran, CEO of Veeam Software and a former executive at Microsoft and SAP, to its board of directors. This strategic move aims to enhance F5's expertise in software, AI, and scaling high-growth businesses, aligning with its focus on innovation for an AI-driven future. Analysts currently rate FFIV a Buy with a $355.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also rates FFIV as Outperform due to strong fundamentals and raised FY26 guidance.

feed.title: Fresh Del Monte Produce (FDP) Declares $0.30 Quarterly Dividend; 2.9% Yield
feed.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce (FDP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, amounting to $1.2 annualized. This dividend, offering an annual yield of 2.9 percent, will be payable on June 11, 2026, to shareholders recorded on May 19, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of May 18, 2026. The stock is currently priced at $41.93 with an overall analyst rating of SELL and a revenue growth of -4.5%.

feed.title: Booking Beats on Profit. Travel Demand Outlook Clouded By Iran War.
feed.summary: Booking Holdings reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, with revenue meeting projections. However, the company noted that the ongoing conflict in Iran is clouding the outlook for travel demand. This suggests potential volatility for the online travel sector despite strong current performance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FICO) Fair Isaac Corporation Posts Q2 Adjusted EPS $12.50 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $10.89
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) reported Q2 Adjusted EPS of $12.50 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $10.89. The company also reported Q2 Revenue of $691.7 million, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $630.2 million. FICO expects a fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS of $40.45 and revenue of $2.45 billion, just below FactSet's estimate of $2.48 billion.

feed.title: MetLife raises quarterly dividend 4.4% to $0.5925 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. announced a 4.4% increase in its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.5925 per share, to be paid on June 9, 2026. This raise reflects the company's strong earnings and capital management, bringing its dividend yield to 2.92%. The article also highlights MetLife's undervaluation according to InvestingPro's Fair Value analysis and recent corporate developments.

feed.title: AI demand now drives 70% of Teradyne sales after record quarter
feed.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) reported record first-quarter 2026 results with revenue jumping 87% to $1.28 billion, driven primarily by strong AI-related demand across its compute and memory segments. Approximately 70% of the company's revenue is now tied to AI-related demand, with all business groups – Semiconductor Test, Product Test, and Robotics – contributing to significant year-over-year growth. Teradyne projects continued robust AI-driven momentum and provided second-quarter 2026 revenue guidance between $1.15 billion and $1.25 billion.

feed.title: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share of outstanding Common Stock. The dividend will be paid on June 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 19, 2026. The company is a leading global producer and marketer of fresh and prepared fruits and vegetables, operating in over 90 countries worldwide.

feed.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) has announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share on its common stock. The dividend is payable on May 29, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company emphasizes its mission to provide clean energy and its commitment to decarbonizing its ammonia production network.

feed.title: Client acquisitions drove $18.7M for Jack Henry in the quarter
feed.summary: Jack Henry (Nasdaq: JKHY) reported $18.7 million in deconversion revenue for its fiscal third quarter ended March 31, 2026, and subsequently raised its full-year deconversion revenue estimate to $37 million for fiscal 2026. This revenue is generated when a client is acquired and its contract with Jack Henry terminates, stemming from factors outside the company's control. Jack Henry explicitly excludes deconversion revenue from its non-GAAP revenue metrics, viewing it as distinct from its ongoing business operations.

feed.title: First Community Bancshares (NASDAQ:FCBC) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.01 EPS
feed.summary: First Community Bancshares (NASDAQ:FCBC) reported quarterly earnings of $0.73 EPS, exceeding the consensus estimate by $0.01. The bank's revenue reached $78.05 million, significantly surpassing analysts' expectations of $44.20 million. Following the announcement, FCBC stock traded up 0.9% on Tuesday.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.0625 per share on the company's common stock. The dividend is payable on July 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 5, 2026. Genuine Parts Company is a leading global service provider of automotive and industrial replacement parts, established in 1928.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Reaffirms Guidance and Capital Plan to Deliver Value to Customers, Communities and Investors
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results with GAAP earnings of $0.70 per share and Core Earnings of $0.72 per share, reflecting a 7.5% increase in Core Earnings year-over-year. The company reaffirmed its 2026 Core Earnings guidance of $2.62 to $2.82 per share and its long-term Core EPS compound annual growth near the top end of 6-8% through 2030, supported by its $36 billion Energize365 capital investment plan for 2026-2030. These results are attributed to disciplined, customer-focused investments in grid modernization and reliability enhancements.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage offers self-storage services at new Allen location
feed.summary: A new Extra Space Storage facility has opened in Allen, manager Jaimie Fredericks confirmed. The facility on Curtis Lane, which opened April 15, offers climate-controlled storage spaces from 25 to over 300 square feet, as well as flexible office and retail spaces. This marks the fifth Extra Space Storage location in Allen.

feed.title: Fidelis Shareholders Approve Pelagos Insurance Capital Rebrand and Governance Changes
feed.summary: Fidelis Insurance Holdings Ltd. shareholders approved a rebrand to Pelagos Insurance Capital Limited, along with governance changes, including the re-election of three Class III directors and the appointment of KPMG as auditor for 2026. The new name and NYSE ticker "PLGO" are expected to be effective in mid-May 2026, aiming to sharpen its capital-focused market positioning. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, has a "Neutral" rating for FIHL stock, citing mixed financial performance and weak near-term technical momentum, moderated by favorable valuation and positive earnings call commentary.

feed.title: F5 Q2 earnings surpass expectations; increases full-year guidance
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) announced robust Q2 fiscal 2026 results, surpassing market expectations for earnings and revenue. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $3.90 against a $3.46 consensus. Consequently, F5 has raised its full fiscal 2026 revenue growth guidance to 7%-8%, citing strong demand from hybrid multicloud adoption, rising cybersecurity threats, and AI inference trends.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage (NYSE: EXR) posts Q1 2026 Core FFO growth and reaffirms outlook
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. reported its Q1 2026 results, showing a 2.0% year-over-year growth in Core FFO per diluted share to $2.04, despite a 10.9% decrease in GAAP net income due to a prior-year gain from asset sales. The company maintained stable operating metrics with a 1.7% increase in same-store revenue and a 1.2% rise in same-store Net Operating Income (NOI), alongside a 93.0% occupancy rate. Extra Space Storage reaffirmed its full-year 2026 Core FFO outlook of $8.05–$8.35 per share, reflecting confidence in its operational performance and disciplined investment strategies.

feed.title: TMX Group Limited announces agreement to acquire Cboe Australia and Cboe Canada from Cboe Global Markets, Inc.
feed.summary: TMX Group Limited, parent company of the Toronto Stock Exchange, has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Cboe Australia and Cboe Canada from Cboe Global Markets, Inc. for US$300 million. This acquisition aims to strengthen TMX Group's global presence, expand client services, and enhance efficiency in Canadian equity markets, while Cboe Global Markets focuses on its strategic realignment towards derivatives and digital assets. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals in both Australia and Canada and is expected to be accretive to TMX Group's adjusted earnings per share within the first year, excluding synergies.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (IR) Ingersoll Rand Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $1.85B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.83B
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (IR) reported its Q1 revenue of $1.85 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.83 billion. This earnings flash indicates a stronger financial performance than anticipated by analysts for the first fiscal quarter. The news was published by MT Newswires.

feed.title: $0.5425 a share: Equity LifeStyle names July 10 payout date
feed.summary: Equity LifeStyle Properties (NYSE: ELS) has declared a Q2 2026 dividend of $0.5425 per common share, equating to an annualized dividend of $2.17 per share. The dividend is payable on July 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 26, 2026. The company currently owns or has interests in 453 properties with 173,419 sites as of March 31, 2026, and highlighted that dividend outcomes are subject to various operational and market risks.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (EXR) Extra Space Storage Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $856.0M, vs. FactSet Est of $851.4M
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) reported its Q1 revenue at $856.0 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $851.4 million. The article mentions that detailed access to the full report is reserved for members. It also provides recent analyst ratings and price target adjustments for Extra Space Storage.

feed.title: Booking Holdings quarterly profit rises
feed.summary: Booking Holdings has cut its annual revenue growth forecast due to the impact of the Middle East conflict on bookings. The online travel agency now expects high single-digit revenue growth instead of low double digits, leading to a 7% drop in shares after hours. The conflict affected room night growth by approximately 2 percentage points in the first quarter.

feed.title: Stronger Q1 lifts ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) 2026 profit and EBITDA outlook
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net income rising 12% to $776 million and adjusted EBITDA growing 13% to $2.0 billion. This strong performance, driven by higher volumes and optimization across segments, led the company to raise its 2026 outlook. Updated guidance projects net income between $3.21 billion and $3.79 billion, and adjusted EBITDA between $8.0 billion and $8.5 billion.

feed.title: eHealth (EHTH) CRO reports 3,571-share tax withholding, holds 309K shares
feed.summary: eHealth, Inc.'s Chief Revenue Officer, Michelle Marie Barbeau, reported a tax-related disposition of 3,571 shares of common stock at $1.89 per share to satisfy tax withholding obligations. This transaction is a routine settlement for equity compensation, not an open-market sale. Following this activity, Barbeau directly holds 309,094 shares of EHTH.

feed.title: ONEOK Announces 12% Increase in First-Quarter 2026 Net Income and 13% Increase in Adjusted EBITDA
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) reported a 12% increase in first-quarter 2026 net income to $776 million and a 13% increase in adjusted EBITDA to $2.0 billion, driven by higher NGL, natural gas processing, and refined products volumes. The company also raised its 2026 financial guidance, with net income projected to reach $3.5 billion and adjusted EBITDA $8.25 billion, due to strong segment performance and a constructive market environment. Key highlights include the relocation of a processing plant to the Permian Basin and an annual dividend of $4.28 per share.

feed.title: (NXPI) NXP Semiconductors N.V. Expects Q2 Revenue Range $3.35B - $3.55B
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. has projected its Q2 revenue to be in the range of $3.35 billion to $3.55 billion. The company also reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $3.05 per share and Q1 revenue of $3.18 billion, surpassing FactSet estimates. Following these announcements, NXP Semiconductors' shares rose after hours.

feed.title: eHealth (EHTH) SVP Galimi reports 3,588-share tax withholding on Form 4
feed.summary: eHealth, Inc.'s Senior Vice President and General Counsel, Gavin G. Galimi, reported a tax-related disposition of 3,588 shares of common stock. These shares, valued at $1.89 each, were withheld to satisfy a tax withholding obligation associated with equity compensation, rather than being sold in the open market. Following this transaction, Galimi directly owns 277,158 shares of eHealth common stock.

feed.title: (NXPI) NXP Semiconductors N.V. Expects Q2 Adjusted EPS Range $3.29 - $3.72
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NXPI) has announced its expectations for the second quarter, projecting an Adjusted EPS range of $3.29 to $3.72. This news comes shortly after the company reported an increase in Q1 Non-GAAP earnings and revenue, with Q1 Adjusted EPS at $3.05 per share and Q1 revenue of $3.18 billion, surpassing FactSet estimates. NXP also anticipates Q2 revenue to be in the range of $3.35 billion to $3.55 billion.

feed.title: eXp World Holdings to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 11, 2026
feed.summary: eXp World Holdings, Inc. announced that it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 11, 2026. The company will also host a virtual fireside chat and investor Q&A session on the same day, featuring CEO Glenn Sanford, eXp Realty CEO Leo Pareja, and CFO Jesse Hill. Investors can submit questions in advance and join the event virtually to learn more about eXp World Holdings.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE: IR) posts Q1 2026 growth and keeps 2026 guidance
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE: IR) reported solid first-quarter 2026 results, achieving $1,847.2 million in revenue, a 7.6% increase year-over-year, and adjusted diluted EPS of $0.77, up 7%. The company also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting revenue growth of 2.5% to 4.5% and adjusted EPS between $3.45 and $3.57. Strong liquidity and strategic M&A activities underpin the company's confidence in its annual targets.

feed.title: eHealth (EHTH) CFO logs 4,206-share tax withholding transaction
feed.summary: eHealth, Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer, John Joseph Dolan, reported a tax-related disposition of 4,206 shares of common stock on April 24, 2026. These shares were withheld at $1.89 per share to satisfy a tax withholding obligation, rather than being sold on the open market. Following this transaction, Dolan directly holds 275,240 shares of eHealth Common Stock, indicating a routine, compensation-related tax withholding.

feed.title: Starbucks: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Starbucks Corp. reported strong fiscal second-quarter earnings, exceeding Wall Street expectations. The company announced net income of $510.9 million, or 45 cents per share, with adjusted earnings of 50 cents per share. Revenue for the period reached $9.53 billion, also surpassing analysts' forecasts.

feed.title: Stronger Q1 Earnings Could Be A Game Changer For Invesco’s Reshaping Story (IVZ)
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported stronger than expected Q1 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$1,744.5 million and net income to US$268.6 million, leading to an EPS of US$0.51. This performance suggests that Invesco's business mix and cost structure can support higher earnings despite ongoing operational reshaping and highlights operating leverage as a short-term catalyst. The company's strategic moves, like selling Canadian fund management agreements, are part of a broader effort to optimize assets and margins, though fee compression and shifting client demands remain significant long-term challenges.

feed.title: T-Mobile Reports Q1 Double-Beat, Raises Guidance
feed.summary: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ: TMUS) reported a strong first quarter, beating consensus estimates for both earnings per share and revenue. The company's Q1 earnings of $2.27 per share surpassed the $2.02 estimate, while revenue reached $23.11 billion, exceeding the $22.97 billion Street estimate. T-Mobile also reported positive postpaid net account additions and growth in service revenues, with CEO Srini Gopalan highlighting the company's progress towards its 2026 and 2027 targets.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors surges as Q1 results, guidance blow past Wall Street's forecast (NXPI:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) shares surged over 11% in extended trading after reporting first-quarter results and guidance that significantly exceeded Wall Street's expectations. The analog semiconductor company's strong performance for the period ending March 29 led to a positive market reaction.

feed.title: Nearly $1M paid to Southwest attendant after 9-year court fight
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines and the Transport Workers Union Local 556 have paid flight attendant Charlene Carter $946,102.87 after a nine-year legal battle. A jury and the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals found that Southwest and the union violated Carter's rights by terminating her for expressing personal and religious beliefs opposing TWU political activism. The District Court also ordered her reinstatement, and ongoing proceedings are considering a potential contempt order against Southwest.

feed.title: FICO (NYSE: FICO) posts strong Q2 2026 results and lifts full-year outlook
feed.summary: FICO (NYSE: FICO) reported significantly strong financial results for its second fiscal quarter of 2026, with substantial increases in revenue, earnings, and cash flow. The company saw revenue growth across its Scores and Software segments and subsequently raised its full-year fiscal 2026 guidance, projecting higher revenue and EPS. This positive performance was primarily driven by strong B2B scoring solutions, particularly from mortgage originations, and growth in software annual recurring revenue.

feed.title: Vistra (NYSE: VST) issues $4.0B senior notes to refinance debt
feed.summary: Vistra Operations Company LLC, a subsidiary of Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST), has completed a private offering of $4.0 billion in senior notes across four tranches maturing between 2028 and 2036. The net proceeds, approximately $3.97 billion, will be used along with cash on hand to repay existing debt, including senior notes due in February 2027 and a Term Loan B-3 facility, and for general corporate purposes. This strategic move aims to manage the company's balance sheet rather than incur additional leverage.

feed.title: New data center fitting moves 100 gallons a minute, aims to cut spills
feed.summary: OPW Engineered Systems, a Dover company, has launched the HyperFlow high-flow data center dry disconnect coupler, designed for liquid-cooled AI and high-performance computing facilities. This new coupler features a Cv rating of 48 and a maximum flow rate of 100 gallons per minute, aiming to prevent fluid leaks and improve safety for critical IT infrastructure. The patent-pending design includes a dual safety interlocking system and a symmetrical configuration for faster, more secure installations, particularly in challenging overhead environments.

feed.title: Truist shareholders get June 1 payout as bank sets $0.52 dividend
feed.summary: Truist Financial (NYSE: TFC) has declared a regular quarterly common dividend of $0.52 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 8, 2026. The company also announced cash dividends for five series of preferred stock, with various record and payment dates in May and June 2026. Truist reported total assets of $549 billion as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Truist declares common and preferred stock dividends
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common share, payable on June 1, 2026. The board also declared regular cash dividends for multiple series of preferred stock, with various dividend amounts and payment dates in May and June 2026. Truist is a leading financial services company headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.

feed.title: Starbucks earnings, sales top estimates; North American comps jump 7.1%
feed.summary: Starbucks reported stronger-than-expected earnings and revenue for its latest quarter, marking its second consecutive quarter of traffic growth. The company also saw a significant 7.1% jump in North American comparable store sales. Starbucks ended the quarter with a total of 41,129 stores globally.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PPG) PPG Industries, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $1.83 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $1.70
feed.summary: PPG Industries, Inc. announced its Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.83 per share, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.70. The company's Q1 revenue also beat estimates, coming in at $3.93 billion against a FactSet estimate of $3.84 billion. Additionally, PPG Industries expects its full-year 2026 EPS to range between $7.70 and $8.10.

feed.title: First Financial investors get $0.25-a-share dividend June 15
feed.summary: First Financial Bancorp (NASDAQ: FFBC) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share, payable on June 15, 2026. Shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026, will be eligible to receive this dividend. The Cincinnati, Ohio-based bank holding company reported $22.8 billion in assets as of March 31, 2026, and its subsidiary, First Financial Bank, provides diverse banking and financial services.

feed.title: [8-K] NEWMONT Corp /DE/ Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation announced that its Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer, Francois Hardy, will retire on June 30, 2026, after 24 years of service. His retirement is voluntary, and he will not receive severance. Erin Workman, currently Group Head, Exploration & Geosciences, will serve as acting Chief Technical Officer starting May 2026 while the company identifies a permanent successor.

feed.title: MetLife Increases Common Stock Dividend by 4.4%
feed.summary: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET) announced a 4.4% increase in its common stock dividend, raising it to $0.5925 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This decision reflects the company's strong financial performance and commitment to shareholder returns, continuing a trend of consistent dividend increases since 2011. The dividend will be payable on June 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 12, 2026.

feed.title: First Horizon Declares Cash Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation announced its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share on its common stock, payable on July 1, 2026. The company also declared cash dividends on its Series E, F, and H Preferred Stock, and First Horizon Bank's Class A Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, all payable on July 10, 2026. This announcement details the specific dividend amounts and record dates for each stock type.

feed.title: Agilent to Announce Second-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on May 27
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) will release its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results after the stock market closes on Wednesday, May 27. The company will host a conference call to discuss these results at 1:30 p.m. PDT on the same day, with a listen-only webcast available on its Investor Relations website. A recording of the call will also be available for 90 days.
